title: Epoxy Floors for Fitness Centers - Elite South Texas
content:
Fitness Centers
Fitness centers require durable flooring solutions that can withstand heavy traffic and fitness equipment. Our flooring systems are ultra durable, easy to clean and antimicrobial. They are slip resistant and offer a variable coefficient of friction. These surfaces can be customized match any design element or meet specific branding and color requirements.
Advantages
Easy to clean and maintain
Antimicrobial, chemical and stain resistant
Ultra durable, high abrasion resistance withstands heavy traffic and equipment
Virtually endless designs and colors
Custom logos
Fluid applied systems for new construction or existing floor restoration
Finish options include gloss or satin
Variable coefficient of friction (COF) levels to meet or exceed ADA Flat Surfaces, ADA Inclined Surfaces, OSHA and NFPA requirements
Vertical applications available to protect walls
Exercise spaces
Weight rooms
Yoga facilities
Tanning rooms
Pool decks
Locker rooms and restrooms
Lobbies and lounges
Juice bars
Offices
Laundry/utility rooms
